professionalSummary: Result-driven Senior Software Engineer with over 11+ years of total professional IT experience, including 8+ years of dedicated expertise in large-scale modern web architecture, frontend state engineering, and large ecosystem development.
summaryBullets: Technical Depth: Mastery over production environments deploying JavaScript, TypeScript, ReactJS, NextJS, AngularJS, HTML5, CSS3, and NodeJS.
Architectural Focus: Proven track record in complex state management using Redux Toolkit, foundational setup of scalable frameworks, and seamless execution of cross-device responsive UI models.

Compliance & Process: Champion of digital inclusivity through rigorous adherence to WCAG Standards and advanced workflow accelerations utilizing Claude AI code execution tools within agile frameworks.

projects.title: Global Accounts, Authentication, MFA, Customer & Clients Management Tool Platforms
projects.links: Production Sites: ticketmaster.com | ticketmaster.co.uk | ticketmaster.ie | ticketmaster.sg
bullets: Led the architecture, design, and development of core enterprise customer and user management platforms, including ACPM, ACAU, Webapp-Common-UI, GDS, ACGA, ATCM, and ASVD webapps
Architected the flagship ACPM and ASVD Global Accounts system from scratch, implementing an enterprise-grade NextJS and React base structure styled with isolation patterns via Styled Components.
Centralized complex global application states by moving legacy paradigms into high-performance Redux Toolkit structures, minimizing re-renders across synchronous authentication pipelines.
Engineered micro-service aggregators on the server level utilizing Express.js and constructed robust, data-efficient query protocols with GraphQL, dropping network data overhead.
Pioneered accessibility standard compliance frameworks, executing widespread refactoring to adhere strictly to WCAG Standards for screen readers, navigation, and core visual elements.
Implemented cross-continental globalization mechanisms via Transifex across strategic webapps (ASMA, MYAM, AACU, ATCM) enabling localization protocols for US, UK, CA, FR, NL, and NZ markets.

Deployed mission-critical identity protection configurations including Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA), live session Freezing/Locking within internal monitoring platforms (ATCS), and role visibility switches.
projects.techStack: ReactJS, TypeScript, JavaScript,Redux Toolkit, Express.js, GraphQL, NextJS, HTML, CSS, Figma, WCAG Standard, GitLab CI/CD, JIRA, Splunk, AWS Infrastructure, Jenkins pipelines, PagerDuty.

Optimized web elements utilizing strict performance scoring benchmarks, enhancing viewport rendering speeds and accessibility behaviors across responsive screen formats.

Re-engineered the cross-team UX Tool from architectural foundations to address deep layout lag; refactored the internal UI Component Selector engine to mimic Chrome Inspector native properties.
